steps.instruction: Heat the grill to medium. Place the cobnuts on a grr tray and mix with the rapeseed oil and salt. Grill unt1 lightly toasted, then leave to cool Toss the salad leaves in the dressing and arrange on serving plates or bowls. Break the cheese into pieces and scatter over the top of the salad, along with the toasted cobnuts.
